positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mystical forest scene embracing celestial motifs. The central element is a majestic, stylized moon-lit grove with intricate bioluminescent flora and entwined roots, forming a clean, dark silhouette against a vivid twilight sky. Key details include geometric patterns interwoven into the leaves, glowing constellations forming arcs around the foliage, and three stylized, floating origami paper cranes circling the core subject. Style is a blend of neo-tattoo art, psychedelic botanical illustration, and linocut etching, utilizing a limited, rich color palette of deep indigo, iridescent teal, burnt gold, and midnight black. Composition must be centered and suitable for repeating apparel printing, ensuring sharp edges and excellent contrast. Trending on Artstation, hyper-detailed, vector-style.
negative: blurry, amateur, low detail, artifact, noisy, text, watermark, signature, dirty, gradient, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn, sketch, cropped, writing
